steps.title: Follow the nation-building idea
steps.content: The sentence describes literature as a medium through which newly independent Mexico shaped a distinctly Mexican literary tradition. The blank should express bringing an autonomous identity into concrete form.

steps.title: Reject negative meanings
steps.content: Choice A would treat the nation's identity as an obstacle to defeat. Choice C would mean publicly condemned that identity, and Choice D would mean avoided it. The fitting word means made real or brought into existence. The answer is B.
